payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless steel over-the-range microwave with a reflective glass door and visible right-side digital control panel; unit is mounted under a wooden cabinet and the right edge is cropped in the image, surfaces show smudges; estimated distance from camera ~0.5 m.
